zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Basset of Headington於大約1179年出生在英國薩默塞特時，她的父親Thomas Basset Lord of Headington24歲，母親Philippa Malbank12歲。她於大約1195年與William Malet Lord of Curry Mallet結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1263年享年86歲。

nameMeanings.name: Basset
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: from a diminutive of Old French bas(se) ‘short, of low stature’ (see Bas ).
English: variant of   Bassett  , a cognate of 1 above.
In some cases also an altered form of French Besset (see Bessette 2). Compare Bassette 1.

variants.name: Bas
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Mauricio, Abelardo, Florencio, Francisco, Jorge, Luis, Manuel, Pedro, Soledad, Vicente.  Eastern Slavic Dmytro, Liya, Pyotr, Sergey.
Catalan: habitational name from a place so named in the district of La Garrotxa, Catalonia.
Basque: topographic name for someone who lived by a wood, from baso ‘wood, forest’.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Basset of Headington was born about 1179, in Somerset, England, her father, Thomas Basset Lord of Headington, was 24 and her mother, Philippa Malbank, was 12. She married William Malet Lord of Curry Mallet about 1195. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died about 1263, at the age of 86.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Basset of Headington est née environ 1179, à Somerset, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Basset Lord of Headington, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Philippa Malbank, avait 12 ans. Elle a épousé William Malet Lord of Curry Mallet environ 1195. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1263, à l’âge de 86 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Basset of Headingtonが約1179年にイギリスソメルセトで生まれた時，父Thomas Basset Lord of Headingtonは24歳，母Philippa Malbankは12歳であった。約1195年にWilliam Malet Lord of Curry Malletと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1263年に86歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Basset of Headington(이)가 대략 1179년 영국 서머세트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Basset Lord of Headington(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Philippa Malbank(은)는 12세였다. 그녀는 대략 1195년 William Malet Lord of Curry Mallet(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1263년 86세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Basset of Headington родилась около 1179 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas Basset Lord of Headington было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Philippa Malbank, 12. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Malet Lord of Curry Mallet около 1195 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла около 1263 г. в возрасте 86 лет.
